title: Discord AutoWhitelist
body:
Discord AutoWhitelist is a modern, easy-to-use Minecraft Forge mod that fully automates your server's whitelist system using Discord roles. Whether you're running a private SMP, a roleplay kingdom, or a premium community server, this mod ensures that only verified Discord members can join your Minecraft world — without manual intervention.


🚀 Key Features

✅ One-Click Whitelisting
Players can whitelist themselves directly from Discord by clicking a button and entering their Minecraft username — no admin needed.

✅ Role-Based Access Control
Only users with specific Discord roles (defined in the config) are allowed to whitelist themselves. You can leave it empty to allow everyone.

✅ Mojang API Validation
The mod verifies every submitted Minecraft username through the official Mojang API to ensure only real premium accounts are accepted (you can disable this option in the config).

✅ Persistent Whitelist File
User data is stored in a lightweight, editable whitelist.json file in your config folder for easy backup and syncing.

✅ Highly Customizable Config
Every part of the mod is tweakable through a simple JSON config file, including:

     Discord bot token, channel, and role IDs

     Embed colors, button text, descriptions

     Custom messages for success, errors, and invalid attempts

     Premium account requirement toggle

✅ Spam-Proof Messaging System
To prevent message flooding, the mod only sends the whitelist embed once, and tracks whether it's already been posted.

✅ Failsafe Logging & Feedback
All key actions (like Mojang checks, Discord responses, and whitelist commands) are logged and confirmed for easier debugging.
